title: SCREENWISE-ENROLLING - 211info
text: GRANT COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT SCREENWISE-ENROLLING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers breast or cervical cancer screenings and/or diagnostics through a network of providers. Helps reduce cancer burden through early detection, risk screening, education, and linkage to medical treatment. 528 E Main Street Suite E John Day, OR 97845 Eligibility: -Ages 18-39 needing breast or cervical cancer diagnostic services (determined by clinician) regardless of gender -Age 40 or older needing breast or cervical cancer screening and/or diagnostic services regardless of gender -Must live or intend to live in Oregon Household income at or below 250% federal poverty level -Must be uninsured or have insurance but not enough to cover their needs Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 575-0429 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 575-0429 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Breast Examinations Breast Self Examination Instruction Mammograms Pap Tests Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER REGULATION - VITAL RECORDS GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - GRANT COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT RURAL HEALTH CLINIC HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - STD CLINIC HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - PUBLIC HEALTH MODERNIZATION HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON INFORMATION SERVICES - TOBACCO PREVENTION AND EDUCATION PROGRAM PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM PUBLIC HEALTH - PUBLIC HEALTH EMERGENCY PREPAREDNESS SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GRANT COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT
